nasb.text: So Moses said to the judges of Israel, “Each of you slay his men who have joined themselves to Baal of Peor.”

esv.text: And Moses said to the judges of Israel, “Each of you kill those of his men who have yoked themselves to Baal of Peor.”

cnv.text: 於是摩西對以色列的審判官說：“你們各人要把與巴力．毘珥連合的人都殺了。”

ccb.text: 于是，摩西对以色列的审判官说：“你们各自把权下与巴力·毗珥苟合的人处死。”
